---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "bug: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / video

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17)
- **Node version:** (run `node -v`)

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem — error messages from the console, relevant project JSON, etc.
